title: Mooresville Implements Stage 2 Drought Restrictions
summary: Mooresville enters stage 2 drought, restricting outdoor water usage like irrigation and vehicle washing.
charlotte_impact: Water restrictions impact residents and businesses, highlighting the severity of the drought.

title: Duke Energy Offers Home Energy Assessments
summary: Duke Energy provides home assessments to improve energy efficiency and lower bills during high temperatures.
charlotte_impact: Home assessments can help residents save money and reduce energy consumption.

title: Fatal Shooting in Northeast Charlotte
summary: One person was killed in a shooting on Tom Hunter Road near North Tryon Street in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: The shooting raises concerns about public safety in the northeast Charlotte area.

title: Woman Charged in East Charlotte Shooting
summary: Hannah Lofton, 27, is charged with assault with a deadly weapon after shooting a man in east Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: The incident highlights violent crime and its impact on the community.

title: 18-Year-Old Killed in Morganton Shooting
summary: Dawson Whisenant, 18, died in a Morganton shooting; Timothy Whisenant, 47, was injured. No arrests made.
charlotte_impact: The shooting underscores the ongoing issue of gun violence affecting young people.

title: Body Recovered from Lake Wylie
summary: York County officials recovered a body from Lake Wylie after a person submerged and did not resurface.
charlotte_impact: The incident raises awareness about water safety and potential dangers in recreational areas.

title: Mallard Creek Appeals Track Meet Disqualification
summary: Mallard Creek High School appeals disqualification at NC state track meet after a viral finish, hoping for co-championship.
charlotte_impact: The appeal highlights the importance of fair play and the impact of decisions on student athletes.

title: Senators Push 'GAME' Act to Curb Gambling Ads
summary: Senators propose 'GAME' Act to restrict child-targeted gambling ads on TikTok and Instagram, with potential fines.
charlotte_impact: The act aims to protect children from the potential harms of online gambling advertising.

title: Heat Wave Forecast for Charlotte Region
summary: A heat wave is expected with multiple days of temperatures above 90 degrees, increasing heat and humidity.
charlotte_impact: The heat wave poses health risks, especially for vulnerable populations.

title: Monroe Campaign Aims to Prevent Crash Injuries
summary: Monroe PD launches 'Slow Monroe' campaign to reduce traffic accidents and prevent injuries/deaths in downtown.
charlotte_impact: The campaign promotes traffic safety and aims to protect pedestrians and drivers.

title: Suspect Charged in Rock Hill Homicide
summary: A suspect is charged in the homicide of a 19-year-old in Rock Hill and was taken into custody in Clover.
charlotte_impact: The arrest brings some closure to the family and community affected by the violent crime.

title: New Renderings Released for I-77 Toll Lane Project
summary: New renderings for the controversial I-77 toll lane project show elevated lanes with added pedestrian bridges and walkways.
charlotte_impact: The project continues to be a point of discussion for residents.

title: New Tool to Increase Flood Resiliency in NC
summary: North Carolina develops the Flood Resiliency Blueprint to enhance the state's ability to withstand and recover from floods.
charlotte_impact: The tool helps North Carolina prepare for and mitigate the impacts of future flooding events.

title: Safe Alliance Faces City Funding Cut
summary: Safe Alliance may lose city funding in the next budget, despite receiving $397,000 last year.
charlotte_impact: The potential funding cut could impact the organization's ability to provide services.

title: Firefighters Battle Lake Wylie Condominium Fire
summary: Firefighters battled a fire at condominiums on Lake Wylie for hours; multiple units were charred.
charlotte_impact: The fire caused significant damage and displaced residents, highlighting fire safety concerns.
